response.original_title: My X-Ray Vision Sees Right Through You
response.overview: In My X-Ray Vision Sees Right Through You movie, after his girlfriend dumps him, Eric, a luxury brand CEO with X-ray vision, uses his powers and confidence to bring down arrogant global influencer bullies, all while winning the heart of his high school's most popular girl.
response.title: My X-Ray Vision Sees Right Through You
